asset: Cold Email Sequence: AI workflow audit
description: Create a 3-email outbound sequence for operations leaders who are exploring AI adoption but have not operationalized it yet.
Write initial connection note, follow-up, and value message for LinkedIn outreach to revenue and operations leaders.

Create a bold but professional social graphic that supports outbound promotion of the AI workflow audit.
